title: Invisible Technologies Agrees to Acquire WeCP to Strengthen Expert Validation for High-Precision AI Workflows
description: SAN FRANCISCO & BENGALURU, India--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invisible Technologies acquires WeCP, adding AI-native technical assessments and expert validation to accelerate high-precision AI workflows.

title: Verint Expands AI Bot Portfolio to Calabrio Customers
description: MELVILLE, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #AI--Three months after announcing its merger with Calabrio, Verint®, The CX Automation CompanyTM, is already delivering on the promise of the combined company. Starting today, Calabrio customers have direct access to Verint's AI-powered bots through the Verint CX Automation Platform. title: Future Secure AI Appoints Todd Hewlin as President
AI Boom Powers TSMC, Chip Giant Posts 30% Sales Surge
description: TSMC reports a 30% surge in early 2026 sales as global demand for AI chips and data center hardware accelerates, reinforcing its role at the heart of the AI boom.
